name: plan-workspace
title: Agent-Native Plan Workspace
description: Agent-Native Plan Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/workspace-manifest.generated.json",
  "name": "@jami-studio/plan-workspace",
  "workspace": "plan",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-29.agent-native-template-workspace",
  "items": [
    "jami-theme",
    "panel",
    "button",
    "docs-source-panel",
    "plan-app",
    "plan-home-page",
    "plan-extensions-detail-detail-page",
    "plan-extensions-detail-page",
    "plan-extensions-index-page",
    "plan-extensions-page",
    "plan-local-plans-detail-page",

    "plan-plans-page",

    "plan-plans-block",
    "plan-recaps-detail-block",
    "plan-recaps-block",
    "plan-settings-block",
    "plan-team-block"
  ],

    "root": "plan-workspace",
    "dependencies": [
      "jami-theme",
      "panel",
      "button",
      "docs-source-panel",
      "plan-app",

      "plan-team-page",

      "plan-extensions-detail-detail-block",
      "plan-extensions-detail-block",
      "plan-extensions-index-block",
      "plan-extensions-block",
      "plan-local-plans-detail-block",
      "plan-plans-detail-block",
      "plan-plans-block",
      "plan-recaps-detail-block",
      "plan-recaps-block",
      "plan-settings-block",
      "plan-team-block"

    "plan",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "local-plans",
    "plans",
    "plans",
    "recaps",
    "recaps",
    "settings",
    "team"

  "shell": {
    "sourceSchemaVersion": "2026-06-29.agent-native-template-workspace",
    "title": "Agent-Native Plan",
    "summary": "Agent-Native Plan Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.",
    "appShell": {
      "id": "app.plan.shell",
      "layout": "agent-native-template-workspace",
      "navigation": [
        {
          "label": "Home",
          "route": "/plan"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Detail Detail",
          "route": "/plan/extensions/:id/:slug"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Detail",
          "route": "/plan/extensions/:id"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Index",
          "route": "/plan/extensions"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions",
          "route": "/plan/extensions"
        },
        {
          "label": "Local Plans Detail",
          "route": "/plan/local-plans/:slug"
        },
        {
          "label": "Plans Detail",
          "route": "/plan/plans/:id"
        },
        {
          "label": "Plans",
          "route": "/plan/plans"
        }
      ]
    },
    "routes": [
      {
        "path": "/plan",
        "page": "page.plan.home",
        "title": "Plan Home",
        "blocks": [
          "block.plan.home"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/plan/app/routes/_index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/plan/extensions/:id/:slug",
        "page": "page.plan.extensions-detail-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.plan.extensions-detail-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/plan/app/routes/extensions.$id.$slug.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/plan/extensions/:id",
        "page": "page.plan.extensions-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.plan.extensions-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/plan/app/routes/extensions.$id.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/plan/extensions",
        "page": "page.plan.extensions-index",
        "title": "Extensions Index",
        "blocks": [
          "block.plan.extensions-index"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/plan/app/routes/extensions._index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/plan/extensions",
        "page": "page.plan.extensions",
        "title": "Extensions",

        "title": "Plans Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.plan.plans-detail"

        "title": "Plans",

      "empty": "No records are loaded for Agent-Native Plan in the local Studio UI port; the original Agent-Native data/runtime remains referenced by source path.",
      "error": "Agent-Native Plan agent or action state is display-only until Jami Harness owns the runtime execution path."

    "agentNativeTemplate": {

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Agent-Native Agent-Native Plan template imported from yrka-io/agent-native as a complete Studio UI workspace shell over all discovered route files; execution remains display-only behind Jami Harness contracts.

upstream.importedAs: jami-authored workspace shell and registry metadata derived from Agent-Native template structure

compatibility.shadcn: Studio UI registry metadata generated from Agent-Native template route inventory; source app remains upstream-owned until forked into Jami packages.
compatibility.tailwind: Consumes generated --jami-* CSS variables in the Studio UI workbench port.
